data.title: Marc Benioff Said Mass AI Layoffs Weren't Coming. Then Came A Brutal Week For White-Collar Jobs.
data.description: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff dismissed concerns about widespread white-collar job loss due to AI, despite warnings from others like Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei and OpenAI-backer Vinod Khosla. However, by the end of the week, the U.S. economy had already lost 92,000 jobs, with notable layoffs at companies like Morgan Stanley, Oracle, and Capital One. Benioff's statement on CNBC regarding the issue did not age well, as job cuts continued to make headlines. Block's 40% staff reduction was cited as a specific problem rather than indicative of a larger trend. Benioff's optimism contrasted with the growing concerns about AI's potential to replace up to half of entry-level white-collar jobs and as much as 80% of jobs in general as discussed by industry experts.

data.title: The 15th Five-Year Plan featuring opening up: China and the world sharing the future
data.description: In Beijing on March 7, 2026, it was reported that China.org.cn shared details on China's plans for greater openness. The 15th Five-Year Plan period (2026-2030) has commenced this year. During the "two sessions," China revealed its aim for a GDP growth rate ranging between 4.5 to 5 percent.

data.title: PureHealth Research Launches Doctor-Approved Natural GLP-1 Supplements Collection for Metabolic Support
data.description: PureHealth Research, based in Manassas, Virginia, revealed on March 7, 2026, a new line of botanical formulations. These products contain clinically tested components aimed at enhancing the body's GLP-1 production, promoting feelings of fullness, and improving metabolic health. The collection is designed to support overall wellness through natural ingredients.

data.title: Global Times: Deliver for real, and turn every policy into smiles on people's faces
data.description: On March 7, 2026, sources report that approximately 33 million households have been provided with financial support for raising children. Additionally, a comprehensive network of elderly care services that caters to both urban and rural regions has begun to be established. These updates were announced during a press briefing related to the fourth meeting of the 14th National People's Congress.

data.title: General Dynamics Leads 5 Stocks Near Buy Points Amid Iran War Sell-Off
data.description: Healthcare company HCA Healthcare and retail giant TJX are approaching optimal buying levels. Defense contractor General Dynamics is also nearing a good entry point. In the wake of market volatility due to tensions with Iran, these are among the top five stocks to monitor for potential buying opportunities. Additionally, dividend-paying stocks such as AT&T and Equinix are highlighted as stocks worth keeping an eye on. This information was provided by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: In HelloNation, Luxury Real Estate Expert Jud Whitlock of Atlanta Explores Why Buyers Are Expanding North
data.description: Recent insights from luxury real estate expert Jud Whitlock of Atlanta Fine Homes/Sotheby's International Realty shed light on the trend of Atlanta buyers relocating to Blue Ridge. As per a HelloNation article, this migration is driven by factors like affordability, natural beauty, and a tight-knit community in Blue Ridge. Whitlock emphasizes that while Atlanta's median home price stands at $350,000, Blue Ridge offers spacious properties with scenic views at a median price of $275,000. Additionally, the peaceful environment and outdoor recreational opportunities in Blue Ridge further attract buyers, proving to be a desirable alternative to the bustling city life of Atlanta.

data.title: Visitors become entrepreneurs, discover opportunities in Yunnan
data.description: On March 7, 2026, in Beijing, an increasing number of visitors are opting to extend their stays in Southwest China's Yunnan province to engage in entrepreneurial pursuits, enticed by the area's unique economic sectors and high quality of life. This trend underscores Yunnan's appeal as a destination for individuals seeking business opportunities, with undisclosed figures supporting the uptick in extended stays.

data.title: Fox ESS Achieves Record 97% Energy Storage Efficiency under HTW Rankings
data.description: A milestone in energy storage efficiency has been reached by Fox ESS, a top renewable energy solutions provider based in Berlin. They have achieved an impressive System Performance Index (SPI) of 97%, setting a new record. This accomplishment positions them as the leader in this sector, showcasing their commitment to efficient energy storage solutions.

data.title: LGMG Showcases New Products and Service Initiatives at CONEXPO-CON/AGG 2026
data.description: LGMG showcased three latest equipment models at CONEXPO-CON/AGG 2026 in Las Vegas on March 7, 2026. The event marked the launch of the LGMG ProCare initiative, indicating the company's ongoing international growth. The equipment models included new additions to the aerial work platform and telehandler categories. This display highlighted LGMG's commitment to innovation and expansion within the industry.
